text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to the academy with Sakura
Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Did you know? My rival is here right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, I start to think it must be an
Umamusume of the same generation, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Did you get it yet? Yes, my rival is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The speed king of the ocean! The sailfish!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The ruler of the land is me. But the current ruler
of the ocean... is that fish!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I plan to take that title for myself and be named
the fastest on both land and sea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I need to master speed to be the strongest Umamusume and the greatest model student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm gonna pay a visit to the aquarium's
special exhibit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: HERE I AM!
choice_data_list: Don't make too much noise inside.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! Even a class representative like me
can't help but get excited sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's lock on to the enemy's position! Where
could it be? ...AH-HA!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's a school of sardines! Did you know eating
sardines can increase thinking power?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ever since hearing that, I started eating the entire
fish from head to tail!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's made my mind as sharp as a knife. Even the
great sailfish would tremble in fear.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, look over there! That thing moving in the
water!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's an amberjack! A fish often associated with
success! Lemme read the plaque. Apparently they
sometimes call them "Mejiro" when they're still
small!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So then, do you think McQueen will eventually
become Amberjack McQueen?
choice_data_list: Remember, we're here for the sailfish!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're right! I just couldn't ignore such a fine
specimen! I was careless!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My senses tell me it's around here somewhere!
Hmm, the fish in the neighboring tank is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A sailfish...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Mnph! Hnnngh!
choice_data_list: (She's excited but still trying to stay quiet!)
(She's excited but still trying to stay quiet!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... So that's a sailfish. It somewhat resembles me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's so sleek-looking, even that look in its eyes... it
is speed fish-ified...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to challenge it! But I can't just go about
breaking the aquarium rules...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Uggh! What should I dooo?!
choice_data_list: Let's just stick to observing today.
How about simulating a race in your head?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see... One must know their rival and prepare for
when the day comes, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No problem! It's time for those sardines I ate to
prove their worth! I will discover the secret to that
speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Did you see that just now?! The dorsal fin went swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, I see! I totally penetrated the hidden
depths of its secret abilities!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: In other words, the trick is... to make your dorsal fin go swoosh with all your might!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! This is the result of my sardine diet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For someone with no dorsal fin, I'm not sure how
that will be useful... But she looks happy, so I
decide to keep my mouth shut.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Simulate a race in my mind? As a genius, the very
thought of it makes my heart pound!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Just... got to... race... in... my mind...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for you... Sailfish!

text_block_list.name: Sailfish
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so you're the fastest Umamusume on land?
Do you think you can compete against my
god-like speed and stamina?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's MY line! Prepare to have your neck... erm,
dorsal fin... wrung out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It was a true battle of speed and stamina! It was
enough to make me want to change my name to
Mejiro Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nobody will ever know what went down inside her
mind, but it seems to have given her some insight.
